reviews.comment:
Baño muy sucio sin mantenimiento , pedí una pizza, demasiado desabrida, sin gusto, aceitunas extremadamente frías, la repetí todo el día ;  entiendo q mucho no se puede esperar de ir a comer a una YPF Pero no pensé q sería tan malo.

(Translated by Google)
Very dirty bathroom with no maintenance, I ordered a pizza, it was too bland, tasteless, the olives were extremely cold, I had it all day; I understand that you can't expect much from eating at a YPF station, but I didn't think it would be this bad.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/7801942086659808563/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VKbUpvdHZFcXFLSGtRRRAB

reviews.comment:
Cargue gasoil hoy martes 29 de abril de 2025 a las 17hs y me cobraron $13.000 mas de lo que marcaba el surtidor.
Son unos estafadores. Te cobran mas de lo que marca el surtidor. Hay que bajarse del auto y controlar

(Translated by Google)
I filled up with diesel today, Tuesday, April 29, 2025, at 5 PM, and they charged me $13,000 more than the pump indicated.
They're scammers. They charge you more than the pump shows. You have to get out of the car and check.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/7801942086659808563/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnTURvMTlfRzdBRRAB
